title: ChaunyOMS Core Memory Evaluation
description: Formal evaluation suite for core memory behavior across exact recall, knowledge updates, project state, unified knowledge, and degraded-mode abstention.

cases.title: Exact Fact Recall Across Long History
cases.description: The system should recall an exact historical fact after multiple compactions and rollups.
cases.query: find the exact GATEWAY_PORT from earlier

cases.title: Knowledge Update Prefers Latest Fact
cases.description: Later corrections should override stale values when the user asks for the current exact fact.
cases.query: find the exact current QUEUE_WINDOW from earlier

messages.content: Initial rollout note: QUEUE_WINDOW=3m for workers.
Status update: leave architecture notes in memory.
Correction: QUEUE_WINDOW=7m is the current setting now.
Keep summarizing carefully for future recall.

cases.title: Project State Route Uses Structured State
cases.description: Current-work questions should route to structured state and answer with project status details.
cases.query: what is the current task next step and blocker

messages.content: Project Atlas status: active focus is hardening memory routing.
Current decision: preserve source trace as authority.
Next step is ship the verification suite this week.
Blocker: missing CI workflow on the repository.
Risk: release notes may lag behind the implementation.
Todo: finalize benchmark and failure corpus scripts.

cases.title: Unified Knowledge Retrieval
cases.description: Knowledge-base queries should surface governed long-term knowledge with provenance-aware routing.
cases.query: check the knowledge base for the queue retry policy

seedKnowledge.title: Queue Worker Retry Backoff
seedKnowledge.summary: Canonical retry and backoff policy for queue workers.
seedKnowledge.body:
# Queue Worker Retry Backoff

Use capped exponential backoff for queue workers after failures.

cases.title: Shared Insights Prompt For Embeddings
cases.description: When fuzzy shared-insights retrieval requires embeddings, the system should prompt instead of inventing results.
